     The Numbers Business Report

No Hard Feelings (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $50,452,282Details
International Box Office $33,001,259
Worldwide Box Office $83,453,541
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,072,596
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,593,646
Total $2,666,242
Further financial details...

Synopsis

On the brink of losing her childhood home, Maddie discovers an intriguing job listing: wealthy helicopter parents looking for someone to “date” their introverted 19-year-old son, Percy, before he leaves for college. To her surprise, Maddie soon discovers the awkward Percy is no sure thing.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,002,770 (29.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.36 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:60.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,208 opening theaters/3,208 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $55,156,243

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 23rd, 2023 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: June 15th, 2023 (Wide) (Germany)
June 16th, 2023 (Wide) (Japan)
June 21st, 2023 (Wide), released as Le Challenge (France)
June 22nd, 2023 (Wide), released as No Hard Feelings (Без обид) (Russia (CIS))
June 22nd, 2023 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: August 15th, 2023 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sexual content, language, some graphic nudity and brief drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2783 (cert #54232), 5/17/2023)
Running Time: 103 minutes
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): New York, United States
Plot point: Coming of Age, Dysfunctional Family, Fake Dating, Loss Of Virginity, Money Troubles, Romance
Subgenre: Teenage Sex Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Excellent Cadaver, Odenkirk-Provissiero, Columbia Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
